name: Naklua 16 Badminton
nameThai: นาเกลือ 16 แบดมินตัน
addressFull: 508/1 Soi Photisan, Naklua 16, Bang Lamung, Chon Buri 20150
hours: Google Maps currently displays a 12:00 opening time. WorldPlaces lists 13:00-23:00 daily; confirm the opening hour and closing time before arrival.

courts.notes: A 2023 international badminton-camp listing names six courts; the current count was not independently republished.

booking.method: Facebook or directory-listed phone; current Maps listing has no phone
booking.notes: A recent Thai review reports that a reservation was not entered and the group arrived to find every court occupied.

englishEvidence: The venue hosted a multi-day Russian badminton training camp and is included in English-language local directories. This indicates foreign-group access but does not confirm reception English.
facilities: open-sided or ventilated hall described by reviewers

audience.whoShouldSkip: Visitors travelling a long distance should reconfirm the reservation because a recent Thai review reports a lost booking.

praise: Thai reviewers praise the court floor, spacious feel, court availability and bathrooms.
The venue has supported organised foreign training groups, not only local casual play.
complaints: A Thai review from about two months before verification says a reservation was not recorded, every court was full on arrival, and staff did not apologise.

comparison.differentiator: The only dedicated Naklua badminton venue in this batch, with evidence of hosting an international training group.

sources.label: Official Facebook identity linked by Around Pattaya
sources.accessNote: Identity URL resolved through Around Pattaya; the Facebook page itself was not directly inspectable.

sources.label: Google Maps location and Thai reviews

unverified: current phone because Google Maps publishes none
current court count after the 2023 training-camp listing
